title: Integrate Clone orchestration with Firebase Emulator and myTrips verification
objective: Integrate the approved Clone operation with Firebase Emulator create-only room semantics, ambiguous-outcome recovery, and verified myTrips ordering behind a disabled feature flag.
acceptanceCriteria: Keep the Clone feature flag disabled by default.
Connect Clone writes only to Firebase Emulator and reject production Firebase configuration or access.
Assemble and validate the complete payload before beginning a room write.
Use create-only room semantics with an operation marker and payload fingerprint.
Resolve timeout or ambiguous results by reading back and validating the expected operation and fingerprint.
Never automatically delete a room that may have succeeded.
Write myTrips only after the Firebase room is verified.
Navigate to real TripDetail only after myTrips is synchronously written and read back successfully.
Retain the Journal and provide repair or open-link state if the myTrips reference fails.
Never insert the Demo ID into myTrips or write Demo-derived state to Offline Cache.
Do not upload attachments or copy ticket and expense domains.
